query:
-- 查看没有城市映射的老师样例
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.phone, u.roles
FROM users u
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%'
  AND u.id NOT IN (SELECT userId FROM user_role_cities WHERE role = 'teacher')
LIMIT 15;
